title: Advyzon debuts native AI system for advisers
excerpt: The product is built with access to client relationships, workflow records, permissions and governance.
content_html:
Advyzon has introduced Advyzon AI, a built-in AI system within its wealth management technology and data platform for financial advisers and investment managers.

The product is part of an "All-in AI" model, where intelligence is incorporated across one platform, one data model and a shared architecture, instead of being attached through separate tools or integrations.

The system is designed to work within existing adviser processes, manage workflows, carry out tasks and provide information intended to support operational efficiency.

It uses shared workflows and platform data to find relevant information, link connected activities across a firm and prepare proposed next actions for adviser review.

The product is built with access to client relationships, workflow records, permissions and governance, and operational patterns through its single-platform structure.

Advyzon said the system extends across advisory operations including client relationships, financial planning, portfolios, reporting, billing, compliance, documents, operations and team collaboration.

Among the functions outlined by Advyzon are client intelligence and meeting preparation, bringing together household data from CRM, portfolios, planning, documents and communications into meeting summaries, discussion points and suggested next steps.

The system also includes note-taking and follow-up support. Advyzon said it captures and organises meeting notes so that discussions are recorded and follow-up actions are incorporated into the adviser workflow.

Other features include document handling, which classifies files, pulls out key data fields and prepares updates for adviser review. The planning function is intended to assist with cashflow modelling, scenario analysis, portfolio optimisation and tax strategy assessment.

Advyzon said the approach is meant to cut time spent setting up general AI tools, fixing disconnected outputs and managing separate systems, while retaining accuracy and oversight.

Advyzon founder and CEO Hailin Li said: "The future of AI in wealth management demands more than disconnected copilots, narrow task automations, or retrofitted intelligence.

"It requires AI that understands how advisors actually work, fits natively into each firm's operating model, and becomes a natural part of daily operations. Advyzon AI is built for that future because the context and knowledge AI needs already exist within a unified platform."

"Advyzon debuts native AI system for advisers " was originally created and published by Private Banker International, a GlobalData owned brand.

content_html_zh:
Advyzon 推出了 Advyzon AI，这是其财富管理技术和数据平台中为财务顾问和投资经理提供的内置人工智能系统。

该产品是“All-in AI”模型的一部分，其中智能被整合到一个平台、一个数据模型和一个共享架构中，而不是通过单独的工具或集成来附加。

该系统旨在在现有顾问流程中工作、管理工作流程、执行任务并提供旨在支持运营效率的信息。

它使用共享的工作流程和平台数据来查找相关信息，链接整个公司的关联活动，并准备拟议的下一步行动以供顾问审查。

该产品的构建可以通过其单一平台结构访问客户关系、工作流程记录、权限和治理以及操作模式。

Advyzon 表示，该系统涵盖咨询业务，包括客户关系、财务规划、投资组合、报告、计费、合规性、文档、运营和团队协作。

Advyzon 概述的功能包括客户情报和会议准备，将 CRM 中的家庭数据、投资组合、规划、文档和通信汇集到会议摘要、讨论要点和建议的后续步骤中。

该系统还包括笔记和后续支持。 Advyzon 表示，它会捕获并组织会议记录，以便记录讨论并将后续行动纳入顾问工作流程中。

其他功能包括文档处理，对文件进行分类，提取关键数据字段并准备更新以供顾问审核。 规划功能旨在协助现金流建模、情景分析、投资组合优化和税务策略评估。

Advyzon 表示，这种方法旨在减少设置通用人工智能工具、修复断开连接的输出和管理单独系统所花费的时间，同时保持准确性和监督。

Advyzon创始人兼首席执行官李海林表示：“人工智能在财富管理领域的未来需要的不仅仅是离线的副驾驶、狭窄的任务自动化或改造后的智能。

“它需要人工智能了解顾问的实际工作方式，适合每个公司的运营模式，并成为日常运营的自然组成部分。 Advyzon AI 是为这个未来而构建的，因为 AI 所需的背景和知识已经存在于一个统一的平台中。”

“Advyzon 首次推出面向顾问的原生人工智能系统”最初由 GlobalData 旗下品牌 Private Banker International 创建和发布。
